## CheatReader v0.1.21

### Highlights
- Added a Locate Reader shortcut that restores the reader, moves it to the current mouse screen center, and briefly highlights it so hidden windows are easier to find.
- Expanded shortcut customization from a fixed list to direct key recording, including function keys and modifier combinations.
- Lowered the minimum reader font scale from 85% to 50% for denser reading setups.

### Notes
- Reader activation through the taskbar/Dock now flashes a temporary highlight border to make the existing window easier to spot.
- Saved shortcut bindings remain backward-compatible with existing users while supporting newly recorded keys.
- Hardened saved preference loading so corrupted enum, shortcut, bookshelf, and numeric values fall back safely instead of breaking startup.
- Improved release checking so malformed GitHub responses are handled gracefully.
